title: Echoes in the Mist
summary: After stabilizing in the Dream Sector, the player follows Somnia’s guidance into the Mistway Corridor, a fog‑shrouded path where memories and corruption overlap. Strange Echoes flicker in and out of existence, mimicking past Codeborn voices. The player must navigate the corridor, protect their Cyberkin from emotional overload, and confront a stronger Echo that tries to latch onto their resonance. Completing the quest unlocks the Dream Sector’s first stable travel node and reveals a fragment of a past Codeborn’s final moments.
objectives: Speak with Somnia at the Dream Sector’s edge
